component.name: LGL Emoji Picker
component.summary: Pick and copy emojis to clipboard

description.p: A fast, keyboard-driven emoji picker with search and recent emoji history. Triggered via a keyboard shortcut (e.g. Super+Alt+E), copies selected emoji to the system clipboard, and stays open for repeated use.

ul.li: Hovering over an emoji now shows a tooltip with the emoji name.
Added visible keyboard focus selection and Space/Enter activation.
Reduced search clearing pauses by reusing emoji grid buttons.
